capabilities.description: A focused capability set built for BCI operations and neuro-AI experimentation.

access.description: Roles and permissions secure platform resources and administrative actions.
access.title: Role-based access

capture.description: Consistent sample format for EEG devices and research protocols.
capture.title: 8-channel EEG capture

kafka.description: Reliable buffering and distribution for analytics and model training modules.
kafka.title: Kafka data pipeline

markers.description: Attach motor or cognitive class markers to improve training data quality.
markers.title: Intent marker annotation

models.description: Browse, organize, and retrieve trained models associated with user workspaces.
models.title: Model management

ray.description: Automate training dispatch and collect model results through secure webhooks.
ray.title: Ray-powered training

capabilities.title: What the platform enables

contact.description: Send us a message and we will help you shape a NeuraFlow architecture for your use case.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your scenario, goals, and technical requirements
contact.title: Let's talk about your implementation

cta.description: Join BCI researchers and developers who use NeuraFlow to analyze EEG signals and train their own thought-classification models.
cta.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.
cta.successMessage: Great! We've added you to the beta testers list.
cta.title: Ready to

features.description: From raw EEG signal to trained model — NeuraFlow handles the entire pipeline in one place.

models.description: Every trained BCI model stored with metadata: accuracy, training date, linked session. Ready for deployment and inference.
models.title: Model Registry

security.description: JWT (JWE/AES-256-GCM), role-based access control (USER/ADMIN), timing-safe webhook verification, and force-change-password for new accounts.
security.title: Security

sessions.description: Create, monitor, and manage EEG sessions with precise protocols (LEFT_HAND, RIGHT_HAND). Full history with timestamps and ACTIVE/COMPLETED status.
sessions.title: Session Management

spark.description: PySpark Structured Streaming processes raw EEG data from Kafka and writes to HDFS — ready for thought-classification model training.
spark.title: Spark Processing

streaming.description: WebSocket gateway receives real-time data from OpenBCI and other headsets — 8 channels, 256 Hz, sub-millisecond latency via Kafka.
streaming.title: EEG Streaming

training.description: Automatic dispatch of training jobs to the Ray cluster. Job handling: PENDING → RUNNING → COMPLETED with accuracy and S3 model path.
training.title: ML Training on Ray

features.title: Everything you need for

hero.description: NeuraFlow combines EEG data streaming, advanced Machine Learning models, and a Ray cluster into one cohesive Brain-Computer Interface platform.
hero.visualCaption: Live data stream with intent markers and cluster telemetry.

highlights.description: The platform supports the complete workflow, from EEG acquisition to production-ready models.

monitoring.description: Track infrastructure health and performance metrics with Prometheus integration.
monitoring.title: Cluster observability

sessions.description: Plan, run, and close EEG sessions with clear marker history and experiment traceability.
sessions.title: Session lifecycle management

streaming.description: Low-latency, reliable transport of multi-channel samples into the data pipeline.
streaming.title: Real-time EEG streaming

training.description: Run training workloads on a Ray cluster and scale jobs across multiple nodes.
training.title: Distributed ML training

highlights.title: Key highlights

howItWorks.description: Five steps from electrode to model — an automated pipeline for BCI scientists and developers.

kafka.description: EEG data flows into a Kafka topic. PySpark Structured Streaming processes it and writes to HDFS.
kafka.title: Kafka → Spark

model.description: Trained model (accuracy, filePath in S3) goes to the registry. Ready to classify your thoughts.
model.title: BCI Model

ray.description: After session completes (COMPLETED), dispatch a training job. Ray cluster runs train.py on HDFS data.
ray.title: Ray Training

session.description: Create a session via REST API, specifying device and protocol (e.g. LEFT_HAND). Status: PENDING → ACTIVE.
session.title: EEG Session

streaming.description: EEG headset (e.g. OpenBCI) connects via WebSocket and streams 8 channels at 256 Hz.
streaming.title: Data Streaming

howItWorks.title: How

meta.description: NeuraFlow is a platform for EEG signal capture, real-time data streaming, and ML model training on distributed infrastructure.
meta.title: NeuraFlow | EEG and AI Platform

tech.archCaption: Microservices architecture with event-driven communication via Kafka
tech.description: Every layer of the stack chosen for scalability, performance, and reliability in production environments.
tech.title: Built on
